summary: Retention Engine APIs fully tested - all 9 backend tests passed (100%). GET /api/streaks/my returns today_count, total_count, streak_days, current_milestone, milestones (requires auth). GET /api/streaks/social-proof returns total_creators, total_generations, active_today from real DB (public endpoint). Frontend retention components (ResultRetentionEngine, StickyGenerateAgain, ExitInterceptionModal) exist with correct data-testid attributes but are imported in StoryVideoStudio.js while the route /app/story-video-studio renders StoryVideoPipeline.js which has its own engagement loop. Previous funnel tracking and pricing catalog APIs still work.

integration_issues.flow: Retention components not rendered in active route
integration_issues.issue: ResultRetentionEngine, StickyGenerateAgain, ExitInterceptionModal are imported in StoryVideoStudio.js but the route /app/story-video-studio renders StoryVideoPipeline.js which has different engagement features
integration_issues.note: StoryVideoPipeline.js has its own engagement loop (Continue Story, Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, Share & Earn) which provides similar functionality

action_items: OPTIONAL: Import retention components (ResultRetentionEngine, StickyGenerateAgain, ExitInterceptionModal) into StoryVideoPipeline.js if the new retention UI is desired, OR document that StoryVideoPipeline.js has its own engagement loop that serves the same purpose
critical_code_review_comments: streaks.py: Clean implementation - /my endpoint queries jobs collection for user's generation counts, /social-proof queries users and jobs collections for real DB data
ResultRetentionEngine.jsx: Well-structured with success-banner, what-next-panel (4 CTAs), remix-strip (6 presets), streak-bar - all with proper data-testid attributes
StickyGenerateAgain.jsx: Shows after 2s delay when visible=true, has generate-again-btn with funnel tracking
ExitInterceptionModal.jsx: Has exit-modal-upgrade, exit-modal-one-more, exit-modal-close buttons with proper animations
StoryVideoStudio.js: Imports all 3 retention components and renders them on step 8 (result screen)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Has its own engagement loop (primary-continue-btn, add-twist-btn, make-funny-btn, next-episode-btn, viral-loop-share) which provides similar retention functionality
App.js: Has trigger-paywall event listener (lines 201-203) for exit interception integration

success_rate.frontend: Components exist and are properly structured

context_for_next_testing_agent: Retention Engine APIs are fully operational. Streaks API at /api/streaks/my (auth required) returns user's generation counts and streak data. Social proof at /api/streaks/social-proof (public) returns real DB counts. Frontend retention components exist in /app/frontend/src/components/guide/ with proper data-testid attributes. Note: The route /app/story-video-studio renders StoryVideoPipeline.js (not StoryVideoStudio.js), which has its own engagement loop with Continue Story, Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, and Share & Earn features.
